summary.en: An AI agent that streamlines military personnel management—assignments, leave, evaluations, and records—through natural language, ensuring faster administration with full oversight.
summary.ko: An AI agent that streamlines military personnel management—assignments, leave, evaluations, and records—through natural language, ensuring faster administration with full oversight.
summary.ja: 配置、休暇、評価、記録管理を自然言語で効率化し、完全な監督体制のもとで軍人事業務を迅速化するAIエージェント。

title.en: AIP Use Case: Military Service & HR AI Agent
